Note: There are no nav data, except noon positions until 0100 ln August 30.
I suspect they were running various tests, because they change position by only five miles between 1900 on the 28th and noon the next day.

Other: 0000: Observed quite a number of shooting stars during watch.

0625: Got Underway. Down west side of Zanzibar towarde English pass.

People: 1020: The Commanding officer and a detail of the Officers of the ship: left the ship to visit the Sulatn of Zanzibar to enter the protests of the Governmant against the slave trade as carried on in his dominions.
